axis: in-service EVENT (eventCanon enum) -> claimed condition (conditionCanon canonical label). Non-presumptive direct SC only; presumptive events route to the existing _PRESUMPTIVE redirect, never enumerated here.
label_discipline: every claimed_canonical is a conditionCanon CANONICAL label (round-trips through canonicalizeCondition) so lookups resolve. Multi-condition rows split. personality-disorder has no canonical label -> covered by the prompt rule + plausible default, not a row.
physician_curation_status: RATIFIED by Dr. Ryan K. 2026-06-14 (all rows physician_reviewed=true). PCP-panel + stress-curation excluded rows added.

rows.requires: documented hazardous noise exposure (MOS on DoD Noise List OR conceded noise)
rows.mechanism: Acoustic trauma -> cochlear/synaptic injury -> tinnitus (IOM 2006); obvious dominant cause, in-service complaint not required.

rows.requires: documented hazardous noise + audiogram showing a NOISE-PATTERN high-frequency (3-6 kHz) sensorineural loss (PCP: do NOT bless low-freq/conductive/retrocochlear)
rows.mechanism: Noise-induced outer-hair-cell loss -> high-frequency SNHL (4-6 kHz notch).

rows.requires: corroborated/conceded Criterion A stressor + confirmed PTSD dx (3.304(f))
rows.mechanism: Criterion A trauma is the definitional cause of PTSD; obvious dominant pathway.

rows.requires: documented depression temporally linked to the trauma (PCP: multifactorial -> conditional, NOT auto-blessed)
rows.mechanism: Trauma contributes to depression but depression is multifactorial -> contributing, not dominant.

rows.requires: documented anxiety temporally linked to the trauma
rows.mechanism: Trauma contributes to anxiety; multifactorial -> conditional.
PCP EXCLUSION: a Criterion A stressor does not CAUSE bipolar disorder (direct analog of the pain->PTSD unsound direction).
PCP EXCLUSION: a Criterion A stressor does not CAUSE a primary psychotic disorder.

rows.requires: MST markers (3.304(f)(5)) + PTSD dx
rows.mechanism: MST is a Criterion A trauma with its own evidentiary relaxation; same mechanism as trauma->PTSD.

rows.requires: MST markers + documented depression
rows.mechanism: MST contributes to depression; conditional (multifactorial).

rows.requires: documented sustained operational/psychological stress + depression (PCP-added: the non-trauma stress door)
rows.mechanism: Chronic operational stress (sleep deprivation, sustained op tempo) is a recognized contributor to depression/anxiety/insomnia.

rows.requires: documented sustained operational stress + anxiety
rows.mechanism: Chronic operational stress contributes to anxiety.

rows.requires: documented sleep deprivation / shift-watch rotation + chronic insomnia
rows.mechanism: Sustained sleep deprivation and watch rotation drive chronic primary insomnia.

rows.requires: documented blast/concussion + headache onset in the post-injury window
rows.mechanism: Post-traumatic headache is a defined direct sequela of head injury (NOT primary migraine - PCP relabel).

rows.requires: documented blast/head injury
rows.mechanism: Direct TBI / post-concussive sequela of documented blast.

rows.requires: documented blast/head injury + vestibular/balance findings
rows.mechanism: Blast-related vestibular injury -> vertigo (PCP-added).

rows.requires: documented blast + tinnitus
rows.mechanism: Blast otologic injury -> tinnitus (conditional; mos_acoustic_noise is stronger when noise is conceded).

rows.requires: documented acute knee injury (LOD/STR/sick-call) - the injured structure's direct sequela
rows.mechanism: Direct incurrence: the documented injury IS the cause of its own chronic sequela in that structure.

rows.requires: documented acute shoulder injury - injured-structure sequela
rows.mechanism: Direct incurrence of the injured structure.

rows.requires: documented acute hip injury - injured-structure sequela
rows.mechanism: Direct incurrence of the injured structure.

rows.requires: documented acute ankle injury - injured-structure sequela
rows.mechanism: Direct incurrence of the injured structure.

rows.requires: documented acute back injury - injured-structure sequela
rows.mechanism: Direct incurrence of the injured structure.

rows.requires: documented acute neck injury - injured-structure sequela
rows.mechanism: Direct incurrence of the injured structure.

rows.requires: SIGNIFICANT documented intra-articular injury + plausible latency + continuity (PCP: post-traumatic OA is delayed/multifactorial = Tier 2, NOT Tier 1)
rows.mechanism: Post-traumatic OA is well-established but delayed and multifactorial -> contributing, not dominant.

rows.requires: documented in-service back/neck complaints + high-load MOS (TIGHT gate)
rows.mechanism: Cumulative load contributes to disc degeneration; multifactorial/genetics-heavy = Tier 2.

rows.requires: documented in-service back complaints + high-load MOS
rows.mechanism: Cumulative load contributes to chronic lumbar strain/DJD; Tier 2.

rows.requires: documented in-service joint complaints + high-load MOS
rows.mechanism: Repetitive load contributes to joint DJD; delayed/multifactorial = Tier 2.

rows.requires: documented in-service foot complaints + load-bearing MOS
rows.mechanism: Repetitive/abnormal foot loading -> plantar fasciitis; Tier 2.

rows.requires: documented/conceded solvent or fuel dermal exposure + temporally plausible dermatitis
rows.mechanism: Solvent/fuel dermal contact -> irritant/contact dermatitis (acute-effect pathway is sound).

rows.requires: documented exposure + per-condition literature + physician sign-off (PCP: chronic respiratory from solvent/fuel is contested -> plausible, never blessed)
rows.mechanism: Acute irritant effect is sound; chronic disease causation is condition-specific and limited.

rows.requires: per-condition NCBI literature + physician sign-off REQUIRED (PCP: chemical->cancer is the highest over-bless risk -> plausible, NEVER blessed)
rows.mechanism: Solvent/fuel -> specific-malignancy causation is contested and condition-specific.

rows.requires: documented cold injury (frostbite/trench foot) + neuropathy in the affected extremity
rows.mechanism: Cold injury -> peripheral neuropathy of the affected part (recognized sequela).

rows.requires: documented cold injury + Raynaud in the affected extremity
rows.mechanism: Cold injury -> Raynaud/cold sensitivity of the affected part.

rows.requires: documented asbestos exposure (MOS/duty) + consistent diagnosis
rows.mechanism: Asbestos -> mesothelioma/pleural disease (established with documented exposure).

PCP/stress-curation 2026-06-14: No physiologic pathway from acoustic injury to upper-airway collapse; noise does not cause OSA. Excluded so the pre-screen does not encourage it via the plausible default.
PCP/stress-curation 2026-06-14: No pathway from acoustic trauma to reflux; excluded.
PCP/stress-curation 2026-06-14: No direct pathway from musculoskeletal load to ED; excluded.
